meaning: n.节省时间的事物或因素
examples: You will find that learning to nurse both babies at the same time will be a big timesaver for you.
We used a digital whiteboard that could save and print diagrams drawn on it, which was a wonderful timesaver.
Supermarkets sell many different types of frozen and instant foods. These products are a timesaver for busy career women.
Study cards, a digital version of the 3-by-5 index cards you used to spend hours making by hand, are a huge timesaver.
